allow: PowerShell($dest = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dest | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://nodejs.org/dist/v24.16.0/node-v24.16.0-win-x64.zip" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\node.zip"; Expand-Archive -Path "$env:TEMP\\node.zip" -DestinationPath $dest -Force; if \(Test-Path "$dest\\nodejs"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$dest\\nodejs" }; Rename-Item "$dest\\node-v24.16.0-win-x64" "nodejs"; & "$dest\\nodejs\\node.exe" --version)

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npm install; npm install @supabase/supabase-js d3-zoom d3-selection fractional-indexing fflate @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities; npm install -D vitest @types/d3-zoom @types/d3-selection)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npm install d3-transition; npm install -D @types/d3-transition)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { npm run lint; if \($?\) { npm run build } })

PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000 } }; if \($ok\) { "landing: 200"; $setup = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/c/local/setup" -UseBasicParsing; "setup: $\($setup.StatusCode\)"; $main = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/c/local" -UseBasicParsing; "main: $\($main.StatusCode\)" } else { "server did not start" })

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "samples\\Death Guard 2k BB without Mortarion.json" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $obj = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; $obj | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; "---roster keys---"; $obj.roster | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($obj = \(Get-Content "samples\\Death Guard 2k BB without Mortarion.json" -Raw -Encoding UTF8\) | ConvertFrom-Json; $r = $obj.roster; "generatedBy: $\($r.generatedBy\)"; "gameSystem: $\($r.gameSystemName\)"; "name: $\($r.name\)"; "costs: $\($r.costs | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 -Compress\)"; "forces count: $\($r.forces.Count\)"; $f = $r.forces[0]; $f | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; "catalogueName: $\($f.catalogueName\)"; "force name: $\($f.name\)"; "selections: $\($f.selections.Count\)"; $f.selections | ForEach-Object { "{0} | type={1} | number={2}" -f $_.name, $_.type, $_.number } | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($obj = \(Get-Content "samples\\Death Guard 2k BB without Mortarion.json" -Raw -Encoding UTF8\) | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $obj.roster.forces[0]; $det = $f.selections | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "Detachment" }; "DETACHMENT: $\($det | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress\)"; ""; $unit = $f.selections | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "Plague Marines" } | Select-Object -First 1; "UNIT keys: $\($unit | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name\)"; "unit costs: $\($unit.costs | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; "unit categories: $\(\($unit.categories | ForEach-Object name\) -join ', '\)"; "unit child selections:"; $unit.selections | ForEach-Object { "  {0} | type={1} | number={2} | costs={3}" -f $_.name, $_.type, $_.number, \($_.costs | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\) })
PowerShell($xml = Get-Content "samples\\Death Guard 2k BB without Mortarion.ros" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $i = $xml.IndexOf\("Revolting Regeneration"\); $xml.Substring\($i - 700, 900\))

PowerShell($xml = Get-Content "samples\\Death Guard 2k BB without Mortarion.ros" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $i = $xml.IndexOf\("63l11gk"\); $xml.Substring\($i - 30, 450\); ""; "--- root element ---"; $xml.Substring\(0, 420\); ""; "--- group attr usage count ---"; \([regex]::Matches\($xml, 'group="'\)\).Count)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { npm run lint; if \($?\) { npx vitest run; if \($?\) { npm run build } } })
